theme: Android NDK r27c and 16 KB page alignment
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.1 is a servicing release that updates the Android NDK to r27c and enables 16 KB page alignment.

bullets.lead: Android NDK bumped to r27c with 16 KB page alignment
bullets.detail: Rebuilds the Android natives on NDK r27c and aligns them to 16 KB pages so SkiaSharp keeps loading on Android 15+ devices that use larger memory pages.
